review: Use this dashboard before relying on chat history for cluster incidents.
Every cluster-health incident should get a dated bundle under workspace/runs/cluster-incidents/.
Every mitigation should include detection, repair, verification, and residual risk.
Do not overwrite dirty node work during incident response.
